title: Financial Document Intelligence System
description: RAG-based intelligence system for Master Facility Agreements and Sanction Letters
highlights: 2x2 VectorDB architecture, Text-to-SQL hybrid reasoning, agentic orchestration

title: AI-Powered Product Accelerator
description: Multi-agent system for pricing intelligence, competitor benchmarking, and AI-generated marketing content

title: Multimodal Price Discovery Agent
description: Agent using Gemini Pro Vision achieving 97% accuracy for price discovery across 100K+ SKUs
highlights: Fallback logic (VectorDB → SerpAPI), 50% reduction in manual lookup

title: XAI for Malware Prediction
description: ML model on Microsoft Malware dataset (8.9M devices) with GDPR-compatible explainability

title: Automated PDF Classification App
description: NLP & XGBoost-based Streamlit app to classify electrical product PDFs

title: Census Income Data Clustering
description: K-Means + PCA for customer segmentation and targeted marketing

title: Lyrics Generation using LSTM
description: LSTM-based RNN to generate song lyrics from seed text

title: Sentiment Analysis & Detection
description: NLP pipeline classifying IMDb movie reviews as positive/negative using Bag of Words and TF-IDF feature extraction
highlights: 89.9% accuracy with Logistic Regression and Naive Bayes

title: Fashion MNIST Classification
description: Deep neural network classifying clothing images into 10 categories on the Fashion MNIST dataset

title: Lending Club Loan Prediction
description: Neural network model to predict loan repayment status using Lending Club data

title: Mercedes-Benz Greener Manufacturing
description: Regression model with PCA dimensionality reduction to optimize manufacturing test bench speed

title: MovieLens Rating Prediction
description: Movie rating prediction using logistic regression, decision trees, and random forests on the MovieLens dataset

title: Scikit-learn Open-Source Contributions
description: Added documentation examples for f_regression() and silhouette_score()
